'''Vengeance Battle Group''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Battle group/Legends|battle group]] centered around the [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Vengeance (Vengeance-class)|''Vengeance'']].

==Composition==
The unit included the Super Star Destroyer ''Vengeance'', numerous escorts, among which were at least three [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]], several [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigates]], a screen of picket vessels, and a high amount of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]], [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|interceptors]] and [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|bombers]].

The group also carried Imperial ground troops, commando units and armored units.

Judging from remarks made by NR operatives, the composition of the battle group was not unusual nor unexpected, which hints at many similar-sized units in existence in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

==History==
[[File:Vengeance_battle_group.jpg|left|thumb|Vengeance Battle Group insignia]]
The naval unit was utilized by [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]] in his search for the mystical [[Valley of the Jedi]]. Thanks to the actions of [[information broker/Legends|information broker]] [[droid/Legends|droid]] [[8t88/Legends|8t88]], the route to Ruusan was discovered and decoded, allowing the ''Vengeance'' and Jerec's forces to [[hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] to the [[Ruusan system/Legends|Hoth's Brand system]].<ref name="Dark Forces: Rebel Agent">''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]''</ref>

Soon after, the ''Vengeance'' orbited Ruusan for surveyance, and sent a small force to [[Battle of Fort Nowhere|destroy]] the [[Fort Nowhere|main settlement]] utilized by [[smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] and colonists.<ref name="DF:JK" /><ref name="JKaudio">[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Jedi Knight'' audio drama]]</ref>

Around that time the Battle Group included a Star Destroyer, three frigates, a screen of two dozen picket ships, numerous escorts and a big number of TIEs, most of them concentrated near [[Turpimir (planet)|the fourth planet]].<ref name="DF:JK" /><ref name="JKaudio" />

The battle group had only half their entitled amount of ordnance and were desperate for more resources. This led to them falling for a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], consisting of a damaged "Imperial" transport packed with [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]]; the ''[[High Hauler]]'' was allowed entry into Ruusan orbit and handing its cargo over to the group. The transport then discreetly allowed NR agent [[Kyle Katarn]]'s ship, ''[[Moldy Crow/Legends|Moldy Crow]]'', to slip out of its cargo bay and into Ruusan's atmosphere.<ref name="DF:JK" /><ref name="JKaudio" />

==Known ships==
*''[[Vengeance (Vengeance-class)|Vengeance]]''
*''[[Sulon Star]]''

==Known officers==
*[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Sysco]], commander of ''Vengeance''
*[[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Vig]], [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] officer
*[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Hab]], stormtrooper officer
*Lieutenant [[Aagon]], commander of [[Patrol 341]]
*[[Unidentified Imperial lieutenant (Ruusan)|Unidentified Lieutenant]]
*[[Second Lieutenant/Legends|Second Lieutenant]] [[Momo]], [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]] driver
*[[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Zonka]], stormtrooper
*Sergeant [[Forley]], driver of [[Zeta 19|Z-19]]
